section.heading: Rule of construction
section.chapeau: Nothing in this chapter may be construed—

paragraph.content: to restore diplomatic relations with the Republic of China; or
to alter the United States Government’s position with respect to the international status of the Republic of China.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle A (§§ 5501–5540) of Pub. L. 117–263, div. E, title LV, Dec. 23, 2022, 136 Stat. 3292, known as the Taiwan Enhanced Resilience Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 3351 of this title and Tables.
